mck_info.address2: An Dong industrial park Nam Sach commune
mck_info.longBusinessSummary: An Phat Holdings Joint Stock Company engages in bioplastic products and materials, packaging, engineering and construction plastics, plastic raw materials, mold manufacturing and precision engineering, and industrial real estate businesses. It operates through Manufacturing, Selling, Trading Plastic Beads and Plastic Products; Selling Factories, Leasing Land and Industrial Zone Infrastructure; and Rendering of Services segments. The company offers biodegradable resins and products comprising compostable bags, knives, spoons, forks, straws, paper cups, and gloves under the AnEco brand name; thin-film packaging consisting of T-shirt, shopping, roll, food, zipper, block header, die-cut, star-folded, and draw tape bags, as well as industrial packaging, including jumbo, sling, and PP woven bags; plastic components for automobiles, motorcycles, household appliances, electronics, mobile phones, etc.; auxiliary plastic products, such as pallets and plastic containers; and ceiling panels, vinyl flooring, and decorative interior moldings. It also produces plastic additives, including PP and PE compounds, plastic resins, color and filler masterbatch, and other materials; and molds. In addition, the company trades in PE and PP plastic resins; sells and leases industrial land and factory buildings; and develops, operates, and trades in industrial park infrastructure. Further, it provides calcium carbonate powder, mechanical processing products, plastic furniture products, and plastic beads; and logistics services. The company operates in Vietnam, Singapore, the United States, and South Korea. An Phat Holdings Joint Stock Company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Hai Phong, Vietnam.
